subject: chemistry
title: 19M.1.HL.TZ2.25
question_html:
What is the major reason why the pH of unpolluted rain is less than 7?

A. methane

B. carbon dioxide

C. nitrogen oxides

D. sulfur dioxide
examiners_html: 69 % of the candidates identified CO2 as the gas responsible for the acidity of unpolluted rain. The majority of the candidates that answered incorrectly chose nitrogen oxides (C) or sulfur dioxide (D).
